name: Clear Glass Cloche Matches 75ct - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Stylish and functional, this 75-Count Match Cloche enhances the visual aesthetics of your home. Made of glass, this cloche features a textured design that elevates the appearance of matchsticks. It houses an assortment of 75 matchsticks and boasts a striker flint on the front for added functionality. Place it on the mantel, entryway table or console table for timeless elegance.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
